{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323200109C121CEDD0BBFA4F46601"}"},"total":10985},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7187943595352326944","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书太好看了，烧脑的推理，温情的结局，正如顾毅所说：“你们看到了副本中的恶，我却看到了副本中美好”（好像是这样说的，记不清了）[爱心][爱心][爱心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1673573673,"group_id":"7157057822021127175","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"学习生活艰辛，便萌发一二感想，假接志怪抒发","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/e1PeTnS7g+dVxTNQLP/ETP0oufxxLI8lLmw3Mfv203","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9bf1134c0d9f4c62aa08e79b061bbe30~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791733&x-signature=XfGTtrWIWfjE6ga5sBxuc3psw%2Fo%3D","user_id":"2893544740370615","user_name":"本少剑若寒霜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2893544740370615","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7157057822021127175","book_info":{"abstract":"【惊悚+推理+直播+国运+系统】
诡异复苏，规则怪谈入侵到世界各地。
周白作为天选者，代表大夏国进入怪谈游戏。
第一个怪谈，是四口之家。
【你和妻子，还有爸妈一起住。但请记住，你的家里只有三个人。】
【你可以相信你的妻子，除非她摘下红色发夹。】
【你和妻子没有生过小孩，如果半夜听到婴儿哭的声音，不用理会。】
【你养有一只黑色的狗，若看到它变成白色，请把它从阳台扔下。】
【切记，不能和你的妻子同房。】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d835d3bb79ea8ef7ad2d668b0af2d903","author":"白胡子","author_id":"","book_id":"7157057822021127175","book_name":"规则怪谈：我的家人不正常","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":537,"name":"惊悚游戏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=537&name=惊悚游戏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7157252126496948773","read_count":"62122","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1241809"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"602","tags":"悬疑脑洞,系统,直播,灵异,国运,规则怪谈,悬疑,惊悚游戏","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/99c4376f8ee937d6f833b852ca109b63~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779451270&x-signature=8loV4Wyzg0sDRnuTeiSQCMi5Wl4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3923527146408183","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.762325e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323200109C121CEDD0BBFA4F46601"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读24小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":96,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":82968,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":87730,"reply_count":8,"show_pv":77633},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7171816254419256078","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超精彩，一口气追过来的，建议别大半夜看[捂脸][奸笑]描写的氛围真挺让人身临其境，主角性格挺讨喜，幽默随和，随机应变，体现着人性，不是无所不能，但会努力追求更好的结果，任务中是带着读者观众一起思考，参与感挺好，每个副本世界描写得诡异又真实，甚至NPC都刻画出了骨肉，赋予其个性和形象，列车上徒手拧下蟒蛇头的小孩乐乐、和爱人舍不得分开自己主动受污染一起下车站的男人、兔耳酒馆老板娘！歪头酒保、鱼头女生，甚至是那个招财黑喵，每个故事很新颖还有关联，不是冷冰冰的通关游戏，有的是打动人的温情。作者加油！","text_exts":[{"e":189,"s":186,"text":"老板娘","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%80%81%E6%9D%BF%E5%A8%98&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774267270A4F46601%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227171816254419256078%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227157057822021127175%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%80%81%E6%9D%BF%E5%A8%98%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1669818697,"group_id":"7157057822021127175","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人生大梦难得是从容","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8n5umCOFrIo/st6anqUFg6BuK3JSdzmECyDsb1x/EgO","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4132451263ce4165a037cc68d156daa1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791926&x-signature=hQnmHzZ1jgj6s1R0TcGrK%2B2gPs4%3D","user_id":"2911098578159438","
